rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID HATHAWAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible due to the recent stay at home order issued by the mayor. Please review the 8th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. ISSUES (to be addressed at hearing): 1) On 10/7/19 the court ordered final distribution and set a status hearing for 3/9/20 for proof Maria and Aaron funds were separated into 2 accounts and distribution to the blocked account of Dana's share. There is no receipt filed that Dana's share was placed into a blocked account. 2) 08/27/2020 and 12/08/2020 status reports do not indicate how much more time is necessary. 3) Examiner has not received a hard copy of the proposed order for the status petition. A hard copy of the proposed order must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. (LRSF 14.93). [Proposed orders may not be e-filed.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GLORIA LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/3/21. (No earlier availability.) No proof of service has been filed. When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.26 D. and E.] Whose children are the niece and nephews and the petitioner who is reportedly a grandnephew and when did the decedent's parents and sibling(s) die? Those heirs/ancestors must be set forth in a supplement, signed and verified by the petitioner. (Item 5a(3) or (4) should have been answered; however, as Attachment 3g(2)(a) states that the decedent was not survived by a domestic partner, this will not need to be addressed in the supplement to the petition.) Courtesy copies of the proof of service and the supplement to the petition must be received by the assigned Examiner before 1/25/21.
